enonce.texte:
Exercise 1: Match the questions with the correct answers

Match the questions on the left with the correct answers on the right.
images: A simple illustration of a person asking for directions in a market.

questions.texte: Match the question with the correct answer.

sousQuestions.texte: Where can I find the bread?
Which aisle is the milk in?

sousQuestions.reponse: b. It is near the entrance.

sousQuestions.texte: Where can I find the vegetables?
sousQuestions.reponse: d. They are in the vegetable section.

enonce.texte:
Exercise 2: Complete the sentences with the correct direction words.

Choose the correct word to complete each sentence: straight, left, right, next to, opposite.

questions.texte: Go __________ and you will see the market.
questions.reponse: straight

questions.texte: Turn __________ at the corner.
questions.reponse: left or right

questions.texte: The bank is __________ the post office.
questions.reponse: next to or opposite

questions.texte: Turn __________ when you see the school.
questions.reponse: left or right

intitule: Reading and Understanding - Directions in a Market

enonce.texte:
Exercise 3: Read the text and answer the questions

Welcome to City Supermarket! You can find fruits and vegetables at the vegetable section near the entrance. The dairy section is next to the vegetable section. The bakery is opposite the dairy section. The checkout is near the exit. The meat section is at the back of the supermarket. The drinks are in aisle 5. If you need help, please ask our staff.
images: A simple map or illustration of a supermarket layout with different sections labeled.

questions.texte: Where can you find fruits and vegetables?
questions.reponse: You can find them at the vegetable section near the entrance.

questions.texte: What is next to the vegetable section?
questions.reponse: The dairy section is next to the vegetable section.

questions.texte: Where is the bakery?
questions.reponse: The bakery is opposite the dairy section.

questions.texte: Where is the checkout?
questions.reponse: The checkout is near the exit.

questions.texte: Which aisle are the drinks in?
questions.reponse: The drinks are in aisle 5.

enonce.texte: Exercise 4: Put the words in the correct order to form directions.

questions.texte: straight / go / and / turn / right / then / .
questions.reponse: Go straight and then turn right.

questions.texte: is / the / opposite / bank / the / school / .
questions.reponse: The bank is opposite the school.

questions.texte: find / can / bread / I / the / where / ?
questions.reponse: Where can I find the bread?

questions.texte: next / to / the / bakery / is / the / supermarket / .
questions.reponse: The bakery is next to the supermarket.

enonce.texte:
Exercise 5: Pair Work - Create a dialogue

Work with a partner. One of you is a customer and the other is a shop assistant. The customer needs help finding different items in the supermarket. Create a dialogue using the expressions below.

Use these expressions:

  • Where can I find...?
  • Which aisle is...?
  • It is in aisle...
  • It is near the...
  • It is next to the...
  • It is opposite the...
  • Go straight and turn...
images: Two people talking in a supermarket.

questions.texte: Write your dialogue here.
questions.reponse:
Example dialogue:

Customer: Excuse me, where can I find the bread?

Shop assistant: The bread is in aisle 3. It is next to the cakes.

Customer: Thank you. And where is the milk?

Shop assistant: The milk is in aisle 2. It is near the cheese.

Customer: Where can I find the fruits?

Shop assistant: They are in the vegetable section near the entrance.

Customer: Thank you very much!

Shop assistant: You're welcome.

enonce.texte:
Exercise 6: Write a short paragraph

Imagine you are in a supermarket. Write a short paragraph describing where different items are located. Use the following prepositions: near, next to, opposite, at the back of, in aisle.

Items to describe: bread, milk, fruits, vegetables, meat, checkout, drinks.

questions.texte: Write a paragraph describing the supermarket.
questions.reponse: Example answer: In our supermarket, you can find fruits and vegetables near the entrance. The bread is in aisle 3, next to the cakes. The milk is in aisle 2, near the cheese. The meat is at the back of the supermarket. The checkout is near the exit, and the drinks are in aisle 5. The bakery is opposite the dairy section. Everything is easy to find.

enonce.texte:
Exercise 7: Read the dialogue and answer the questions

Customer: Excuse me, where can I find the rice?

Shop assistant: The rice is in aisle 4, next to the pasta.

Customer: Thank you. Where is the fish?

Shop assistant: The fish is in the meat section at the back of the supermarket. It is opposite the chicken.

Customer: And where is the checkout?

Shop assistant: The checkout is near the entrance.

Customer: Great! Can you tell me where the drinks are?

Shop assistant: The drinks are in aisle 5, near the snacks.
images: A customer talking to a shop assistant.

questions.texte: Where is the rice?
questions.reponse: The rice is in aisle 4, next to the pasta.

questions.texte: Where is the fish?
questions.reponse: The fish is in the meat section at the back of the supermarket.

questions.texte: What is opposite the chicken?
questions.reponse: The fish is opposite the chicken.

questions.texte: Where is the checkout?
questions.reponse: The checkout is near the entrance.

questions.texte: Where are the drinks?
questions.reponse: The drinks are in aisle 5, near the snacks.

enonce.texte:
Exercise 8: Pair Work - Role Play

Work with a partner. One of you is a tourist who is lost. The other is a local who gives directions. Use the map below or imagine a local market.

Places to include: market, school, hospital, bank, post office, bus stop.

Use these expressions:

  • Excuse me, where is the...?
  • Go straight...
  • Turn left/right...
  • It is next to / opposite / near the...
images: A simple map of a town with key places labeled.

questions.texte: Write your dialogue here.
questions.reponse:
Example dialogue:

Tourist: Excuse me, where is the market?

Local: Go straight for about 100 metres. Turn left at the bank. The market is next to the post office.

Tourist: Thank you. And where is the hospital?

Local: The hospital is opposite the school. Go straight and turn right at the traffic lights.

Tourist: Is it far?

Local: No, it is very close.

Tourist: Thank you very much for your help!

Local: You are welcome.

enonce.texte:
Exercise 9: Write a guide to a supermarket

Imagine you work in a supermarket. Write a short guide to help customers find items. Include the following sections: fruits and vegetables, dairy products, bakery, meat, drinks, checkout.

Use these expressions:

  • You can find... in aisle...
  • It is near/next to/opposite the...
  • Go straight and turn...

questions.texte: Write a guide for customers.
questions.reponse: Example answer: Welcome to our supermarket! You can find fruits and vegetables near the entrance, next to the flowers. The dairy section is in aisle 2, where you can find milk, cheese, and yogurt. The bakery is in aisle 3, opposite the dairy section. The meat and fish are at the back of the supermarket. The drinks are in aisle 5, near the snacks. The checkout is near the exit. If you need help, please ask our staff. We hope you enjoy your shopping!

enonce.texte:
Exercise 10: Listen and follow the directions

Your teacher will read the following directions. Draw the path on a piece of paper and answer the questions.

(Teacher's script: Start at the entrance. Go straight to the end of the aisle. Turn right. You will see the bread section. The bread is next to the cakes. The milk is opposite the bread. The checkout is near the exit.)
images: A blank simple supermarket map for students to draw on.

questions.texte: Draw the path based on the directions.
questions.reponse: Expected drawing: Students should draw a line starting at the entrance, going straight to the end, turning right, and marking the bread section, with cakes next to it and milk opposite.

questions.texte: Where is the bread?
questions.reponse: The bread is next to the cakes.

questions.texte: Where is the milk?
questions.reponse: The milk is opposite the bread.
